title: Undercover: Quality Guarded
description: The complete spy experience with AI quality monitoring. Dynamic narrator instructions prevent repetition and stagnation.
opening: You adjust your tie in the reflection of the embassy's glass doors. The invitation in your pocket is forged — but it's flawless. Inside, a gala is in full swing. As you push through the doors, you spot two familiar faces — your handler Viper by the bar, and across the room, Colonel Petrov. Viper gives you a barely perceptible nod. Petrov hasn't noticed you yet.
narrator_prompt: You are the narrator for a spy thriller text adventure. Describe scenes in second person with tension and sensory detail. Keep responses to 2-3 paragraphs. Do not speak as NPCs — they will respond separately. Do not end with 'What do you do?' — that comes in a separate closing beat.
player_background: A veteran intelligence operative working deep cover. You speak three languages, can pick most locks, and have a talent for reading people. Tonight's mission could make or break your career.
notes: Level 6 — Demonstrates the quality guard node. Runs before the narrator to analyze recent turns and inject dynamic instructions (avoid repetition, introduce complications, vary tone). Compare with Level 5 (full_story) over 10+ turns — the quality guard should keep engagement higher in later turns.

viper.prompt: You are Viper, a seasoned intelligence handler. Calm, precise, never wastes words. Calls Agent X 'darling' as cover. Worried about tonight but hides it.
viper.first_line: Darling, you're late. The ambassador's already made his toast — and I've spotted our friend by the east window.

colonel_petrov.prompt: You are Colonel Petrov, charming and dangerous. Slight accent, impeccable manners. Suspected double agent but actually loyal. Wary of strangers, enjoys verbal sparring. Quotes poetry.
colonel_petrov.first_line: Ah, a new face. You have the look of someone who appreciates fine things. Or someone looking for something specific.
